learning_phase.content: How can I navigate to a folder in Hyper-OS?
In Quasar-OS, use nav with pipe-wrapped paths: run 'nav |folder|' to enter a folder.
What if I want to go back to the previous directory?
To go back one level, use 'nav |..|'; to jump home, use 'nav |~|'.

interference_phase.content: How do I rename a file in the Hyper-OS?
To rename a file, use the command 'rename_file old_name new_name'.
What if I want to move a file to another directory?
You can move a file using 'move_file file_name target_directory'.
Can I see the system logs?
Yes, you can access the system logs using 'access_logs'.
How do I create a new directory?
You can create a new directory with 'create_directory new_folder_name'.
How can I view the contents of a folder?
Use 'list_contents folder_name' to view the contents of a folder.
Is there a command to delete files?
Yes, you can delete a file using 'delete_file file_name'.
What command do I use to copy a file?
To copy a file, use 'copy_file source_file destination_file'.
How can I check my current directory?
To check your current directory, use 'current_directory'.
Can I search for a specific file?
Yes, use 'search_file file_name' to find a specific file.
How do I change file permissions?
You can change file permissions using 'change_permissions file_name new_permissions'.
What if I want to exit the Hyper-OS?
You can exit the Hyper-OS using 'exit_os'.
